o3.label: IoT

o3.label: IoT
o3.reason: FreeRTOS is an embedded real-time operating system specifically intended for microcontroller-based IoT devices. The flaw is in its TCP/IP stack code (xProcessReceivedUDPPacket / prvParseDNSReply). FreeRTOS is itself an active element of IoT devices, so the vulnerability is IoT-specific and falls under the device layer, which includes firmware or embedded OSes such as FreeRTOS.

Reviewer4.notes: FreeRTOS is associated to IoT devices

Reviewer5.notes: Operating system for low power devices. Not exclusively IoT but does impact IoT devices that run this.

Reviewer6.notes: RTOS is a real time os, can be used for Iot but doesn't have to. not sure
